calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-10-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Petitioner: Fatima Omer Ali, present in pro per and with Arabic Interpreter: Michael Sotiriou, were affirmed and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the name to: Fatima Omer Ali Saleh.
Decree signed in open court.
